complete_domain.derivation: 7 col0 values * 7 col1 values * 4 gravity values
complete_domain.proof: Every one of the 196 states is individually infeasible for the shared center/arm homogeneous classifier. Therefore no common foreground kernel, regardless of the independent background kernel, can make even one complete case exact.
